Case# CWErr.cwdsssofdmUnsupportedErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwdsssofdmUnsupportedErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwdsssofdmunsupportederr#Discussion)

Association denied because DSSS-OFDM is not supported by requesting station.
